# 前端逐条测试指令

```text
login 2118 abcd
mkdir workdir
cd workdir
pwd
mkdir subdir
cd subdir
pwd
cd ..
pwd
cd ..
pwd
cd nonexist
pwd
create doc1
write 0 HelloWorld
close 0
cat doc1
wc doc1
stat doc1
open doc1 read
read 0 20
close 0
create doc2 0644
dir
close 0
create doc1
write 0 Overwritten
close 0
open doc1 read
read 0 20
close 0
create appendfile
write 0 First
close 0
open appendfile append
write 0 Second
close 0
cat appendfile
cp doc1 doc1copy
mv doc1copy doc1moved
stat doc1moved
cat doc1moved
open doc1moved read
lseek 0 5
read 0 10
close 0
chmod doc2 0755
dir
chmod doc2 0644
dir
chmod doc2 0000
dir
chmod doc2 0777
create rootdemo RootOnlyData
close 0
chmod rootdemo 0000
open rootdemo read
logout
login 0 root
open rootdemo read
read 0 30
close 0
chmod rootdemo 0777
logout
login 2118 abcd
df
create chowntest ChownTestData
close 0
stat chowntest
chown 99 chowntest
stat chowntest
logout
login 0 root
chown 2118 chowntest
stat chowntest
logout
login 2118 abcd
create bigfile
open bigfile write
write 0 
write 0 
write 0 
write 0 
write 0 
write 0 
write 0 
write 0 
write 0 
write 0 
write 0 
write 0 
close 0
dir
open bigfile read
read 0 20
lseek 0 4608
read 0 20
close 0
ln doc1moved hlink
symlink doc1moved slink
dir
cat hlink
cat slink
find / doc1moved
mkdir nonempty
cd nonempty
create dummy
close 0
cd ..
rmdir nonempty
cd nonempty
delete dummy
cd ..
rmdir nonempty
delete doc1
delete doc1moved
delete doc2
delete appendfile
delete bigfile
delete hlink
delete slink
delete rootdemo
delete chowntest
cd workdir
rmdir subdir
cd ..
rmdir workdir
```
